reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
저희 멈머 원픽 장난감 됐어요 :)
원래 라텍스 질감 좋아했는데 입에 물기 좋은 사이즈여서 그런지 던져달라고 물고오고 혼자서도 던지고 놀고 잘근잘근 씹으면서 삑삑 거리면서 엄청 잘 놀아요! 3일만에 내동생은 만신창이가 됐는데 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ 나중에 동생 하나 더 입양해 줘야겠어요 ☺️
reviews.content_en: This became our pup's #1 toy! 😊 He already liked latex textures, but the size is perfect for grabbing in his mouth, so he keeps bringing it back asking me to throw it and plays with it even by himself. He squeaks it constantly while chewing away and has the best time! My brother's toy got absolutely destroyed in just 3 days lol, so I think I need to adopt another sibling for him later ☺️

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 장난감 킬러라서 이건 오래 살아남을 수 있을까 하면서 구매했는데 너무 튼튼해서 대만족이었아요 ㅎㅎ 하루종일 깨물고있어도 찢어지지도 않고 두개사서 번갈아가면서 놀이해주고있어요 이건 진짜 오래 쓸꺼같아서 짱이에요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Since my pup is a toy destroyer, I was wondering if this would last, but it's SO durable that I'm totally satisfied lol He can chew on it all day and it doesn't tear at all. I got two so we can rotate between them during playtime. I think this one will last forever, it's awesome lol

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 안녕하세요 콩순이예요🤎🤍 콩순이 동생 콩실이(ㅋㅋㅋ)를 사줬어요~~ 던져주면 통통 튀는데 그거 따라 잡으려고 막 뛰어다니고 난리난리입니다ㅋㅋㅋ 콩순이가 아직 5개월이라 이빨이 작아도 힘이 약하진 않은데.. 잘 뜯어지는 재질은 아닌가봐요. 일주일 내내 가지고 놀았는데 아직 멀쩡하네용ㅎㅎ 다행이예요~~ 라텍스 재질 특성상 먼지가 잘 묻어서 일부러 잘 보이게 흰색으로 샀는데, 그렇게 심하게 묻지는 않더라구요~ 넘 맘에 듭니닷ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Hi, this is Kongsun! 🤎🤍 I got Kongsun's little sibling Kongsil (lol) a toy~~ When you throw it, it bounces and she goes crazy running after it haha Kongsun is only 5 months old so even though her teeth are small, her bite is strong... but it doesn't seem to be the type of material that tears easily. She's been playing with it all week and it's still in perfect condition hehe So glad~~ Since latex naturally collects dust, I deliberately bought it in white to make it visible, but it doesn't actually collect that much dust~ I love it so much hehe

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 너무나 좋아하는 내동생 비숑입니다!!진짜 왜 진작 안사줬나싶어요!!
reviews.content_en: My little brother (Bichon Frise) absolutely loves it!! I really wonder why I didn't buy it sooner!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
사이즈가 작아서 소형견이 물고 놀기 딱 좋은 거 같아요
말랑말랑 하고 디자인이 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠ
아이가 너무 좋아해줘서 다행이에요
reviews.content_en: The small size seems perfect for small dogs to grab and play with. It's soft and the design is so cute ㅠㅠ I'm glad my pup loves it so much

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 오자마자 자기 건 줄알고 폴짝폴짝 뛰고 난리ㅋㅋㅋ침대 옆에 떨어 트려 놓고 계속 낑낑대고ㅋㅋ워낙 라텍스 공 좋아 하는 울 애깅이지만 요건 최애 장난감 등극 했어욤~ 다만 흰색이고 물고 다녀서 침에 먼지가 묻어 자주 닦아줘야 되네요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The second it arrived, he thought it was his and started jumping around like crazy lol I threw it on the floor by the bed and he keeps whining lol My pup usually loves latex balls, but this one has become his favorite toy~ The only thing is that it's white and he carries it around in his mouth, so I have to wash it frequently because of dust and saliva lol

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content_en: It was a communal toy at the dog café's play area, and he was chewing on it all day, so I got him one right when we got home. I was supposed to order the cream latte color but accidentally ordered silver instead, but my pup loves it lol He had it in his mouth for 3-4 days straight after I opened the package lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 라텍스 장난감은 처음 사줬는데 완전 좋아해서 가져가서 안고 있어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 맨날 삑삑대면서 던져달라고 물고오는데 둘 다 비숑이라 더 귀여워용!
reviews.content_en: It's my first time buying a latex toy and he absolutely loves it - he carries it around with him lol He's always squeaking it and bringing it back asking me to throw it, and since both of us have Bichons, it's even cuter!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희 아이랑 같은 색깔인 크림라떼로 사봤는데 통통 잘 튕기고 굴러가서 너무 재밌어하구 좋아하네요♡
reviews.content_en: I bought it in cream latte to match my pup's color, and he loves it because it bounces well and rolls around so much ♡

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 라텍스 장난감 집에 많이 있는데요, 얘는 좀 다르네요. 물고뜯는게 남달라서 장난감들 사줬다하면 3일을 못가는데.. 내동생은 일주일 다되가도록 멀쩡해서 놀라워요ㅋㅋ 소형견이 갖고놀기에 크기도 딱이고, 상품 퀄리티도 가격값하는것 같아서 또 사주려구요!(색깔별로 쟁일까 생각중이예요ㅋㅋㅋ) 삑삑 소리도 너무 시끄럽지도 작지도 않고 딱이구요, 이것만 집었다하면 애가 신이 나서 뜀박질해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 근데 좀 갖고놀면 먼지랑 침범벅대서 중간중간 씻어주고 있습니다ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I have a lot of latex toys at home, but this one is different. My other brother chews and tears so aggressively that toys don't last 3 days... but this one is still perfect even after almost a week, which is amazing lol The size is perfect for small dogs to play with, and the quality seems worth the price, so I'm planning to buy it again! (I'm thinking about getting different colors lol) The squeaking sound is just right - not too loud and not too quiet, and whenever my pup picks this up, he gets so excited and starts jumping around lol But after playing with it a bit, it gets dusty and covered in drool, so I wash it periodically lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우리 집 강아지랑 크림색 푸들 장난감이랑 넘 닮아서 구매했는데 강쥐가 환장해요.
가지고 노느라고 잠도 안자고 삑삑거리네요.
뺏길까봐 째려보는 모습도 넘 귀욤...
잘 갖고놀아서 뿌듯하답니다.
역시 장난감은 바잇미!!!
reviews.content_en: I bought it because our dog looks so similar to a cream-colored poodle toy, and my pup is absolutely obsessed with it! 🐕 He plays with it so much he won't even sleep, and it keeps squeaking. The way he glares at it so no one takes it away is so cute... I'm so proud that he's playing with it well. BITE ME toys are the best!!!

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 까자마자 좋아하는 울집 강쥐… 환장하게 가지고 놉니다.. 천연라텍스라 더 맘에 들어요!!  혹시나 강쥐 이빨로인해 색상 벗겨질까봐 저는 화이트로 구매했어요! 천연라텍스 컬러가 원래 아이보리? 크림? 그런 걸어라고 하길래요..ㅎㅎ 최대한 가까운 컬러로 구매했습니다 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup loved it right out of the box... he's absolutely crazy about playing with it! I love that it's made with natural latex!! Just in case my pup's teeth damage the color, I went with white. The natural latex color is apparently ivory or cream colored or something like that ㅎㅎ So I bought the closest color I could find ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 바잇미 인형 벌써 8개째 해드셨어요 처음 아트박스 갔다가 구매했는데 너무 좋아해서 갈때마다 사오다 첨으로 온라인 주문 시켰는데 이미 다 해드셔서 다시 재주문 해야할 것 같아요
reviews.content_en: This is already the 8th BITE ME toy I've given my pup! I first bought one at ArtBox and he loved it so much I kept buying more every time I went there. This is my first time ordering online, but he's already destroyed all of them so I think I need to reorder again 😅

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
다 자기꺼라네요
너무 귀엽고 소리나는 삑삑이 못잃어~~ 🤍
reviews.content_en: It's all his now 🐕 So cute and the squeaker toy is a keeper!! 🤍

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
입이작아 뚱뚱한 장난감은 잘 물지못해서인지
내동생라텍스 장난감에 유독 애착을 보이더라고요 ㅎㅎ

혼자 장난감 가지고 놀지 않는데
이건 혼자 애지중지하면서 노는게 넘 웃겨요 ㅎㅎ

컬러가 다 예뻐 3컬러 구매해서 
2개 눈코입 날려먹고 삑삑이까지 해먹은뒤
(평소 망가지는 장난감이 없었음)
하나남아서 더 구매해두었습미다 :) 

귀엽고 또 귀여운 장난감 많이 만들어주셔서 감사해요💛
이시리주 꾸준히 나오면좋겠습니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup has a small mouth and can't really bite the chubby toys, so I noticed he shows extra attachment to the latex toys 😆 He doesn't usually play with toys by himself, but watching him play with this one so carefully on his own is hilarious 😆 I bought all 3 colors because they're so pretty, and after he chewed off the eyes, nose, mouth AND the squeaker on 2 of them (he's never destroyed toys before), I only had one left so I ordered more 😅 Thank you for making such cute and adorable toys! 💛 I hope this series keeps coming out regularly ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요 ㅠㅜ 매번 다이소 장난감만 사주다가 이번에 생일이라 많이 주문해봤는데 국내제작 상품이라 안심하고 줄수있을거같아요 강아지들 애착인형으로 딱입니다 사이즈도 딱 좋구 ㅎㅎㅎ 소형견도 충분히 가지고 놀만큼 귀엽고 이뻐요💜💜😍
reviews.content_en: I love it so much ㅠㅜ I used to only buy Daiso toys, but since it was his birthday I ordered a lot this time. Since it's made domestically, I feel safe giving it to him. It's perfect as an attachment toy for dogs! The size is just right too ㅎㅎㅎ Even small breeds can play with it enough - it's so cute and pretty 💜💜😍

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 강아지가 크림색인데 장난감이랑 색이 똑같아서 너무 귀여워요 ㅎ 장난감 도착하자마자 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요 !
reviews.content_en: My dog is cream-colored and the toy is the exact same color so it's adorable ㅎ He started playing with the toy right when it arrived!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 제품재질도 아이한테 괜찮고 국내산이라 더 좋네요 그래서 가격이 있는지... 삑삑소리나고 물기편해 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The material quality is good for my pup and it's domestic made so that's great. Maybe that's why the price is higher... But it has a squeaker sound and it's easy to bite, so he loves it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
두번째 구매에요. 
강쥐가 넘 좋아해서 하나 더 구매했내요.
다른 삑삑이 보다 튼튼해서 조금 더 오래갔네요.
비숑 닮은 얼굴로 되어있어서 더 귀여워요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: This is my second purchase. My pup loves it so much I bought another one. It's more durable than other squeakers so it lasts longer. It has a face that looks like a Bichon so it's extra cute ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
지금까지 써본 삑삑이 중에 가장 저소음이에요! 우선 물로 씼어도 괜찮은거라 위생적으로 정말 안심이 되네요. 실리콘이라 먼지가 조금 잘 붙긴 하지만 물티슈로 쓰윽 닦으면 금방 깨끗해져서 괜찮아요!ㅎㅎ 그리고 저렴한 실리콘 장난감은 좀 이상한 달달한 냄새가 나고 그러잖아요,,근데 이건 무향 그 자체! 
공도 잘 굴러가고 저희 집 강아지는 계속 물고있네요ㅎㅎ 찹쌀떡 물고있는 것 처럼 졸귀탱..
reviews.content_en: This is the quietest squeaker toy I've ever used! First of all, it's safe to wash with water so I feel really secure hygiene-wise. It's silicone so it picks up dust a little bit, but a quick wipe with a wet wipe and it's clean again so that's fine! ㅎㅎ And cheap silicone toys usually have a weird sweet smell, but this one is completely odorless! The ball rolls well too and my pup keeps chewing on it ㅎㅎ It's so cute watching him hold it like a piece of chapssal tteok (glutinous rice cake) 😆

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
삑삑이소리나는곳을 다 조져놔서 소리안나와여..
너무좋아해요...가격이비싼편이라 고민했는데
내구성이좋아 재주문했어요!
reviews.content_en: I squeezed out all the squeaky spots so it doesn't make noise anymore.. My dog loves it so much! I was hesitant because of the price, but the durability is so good that I reordered it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지가 라텍스 장난감을 정말 좋아하는데 요건 특별히 더 오래 갖고 노네요~~ 튼튼하고 너무 귀여워요!
reviews.content_en: My dog really loves latex toys, and this one especially keeps her playing with it for a long time~~ It's so durable and adorable!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 귀엽습니다 ㅎㅎㅎ 소리도 별로 크지 않아서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: It's cute ㅎㅎㅎ The sound isn't too loud either, which is nice

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 포장 뜯기전부터 너무 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: I love it even before opening the package

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
처음엔 못갖고 놀다가 이제 최애장난감이 되었어요.
하도 물고 밟고 난리나서 꼬질한 동생이 되었답니다^^ 울퉁불퉁해서 랜덤으로 발사되니, 애가 환장하고 뛰어다녀용
reviews.content_en: At first she didn't know how to play with it, but now it's her favorite toy. She bites and steps on it so much that it's gotten all grimy lol^^ It's bumpy and launches randomly, so she goes crazy running around with it

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
쥔님 걔는 가짜에오....!!
진짜 보다 더 진짜 같은 내동생 🤍
비숑이닉가 당연히 흰색으로 구매 ! 다른 색들도 넘넘 귀여웠는데 흰색이 먼지도 잘 보이고 그래서 흰색으로 낙찰 🐑
요고 하나 주면 정신없이 핥아줘서 입주변이 축축해질 정도로 무아지경.....🤦🏻‍♀️
안 뺏기려고 축축한 입으로 경계하는거 보세요..후회없는 구매입니다 ㅠ
reviews.content_en:
You're fake.... !! 🤍 My little sibling that looks even more real than the real one
Obviously got it in white since it's a Bichon! The other colors were super cute too, but white shows dirt better so I went with white 🐑
When I give her this, she licks it like crazy to the point her mouth gets all wet.... 🤦🏻‍♀️ Look at her being so protective with her wet mouth trying not to let me take it away.. No regrets buying this ㅠ

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
기존에 삑삑이는 어디로 가출했는지
안보여서 구매했어요ㅋㅋ
뜯어주자마자 아주 열심히 가지고 놀아요ㅋㅋ
소리도 생각보다 크지않아서 귀는 덜아프겠어요ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The old squeaky toy disappeared somewhere, so I bought this one lol She plays with it so enthusiastically right away lol The sound isn't as loud as I thought, so her ears won't hurt as much lol

reviews.content: 구매한거중에 제일좋아하는거 같아요 라텍스장난강이 없어서 구매했는데 벌써부터 최애 장난감된거같아요 다른색도 소장용으로 갖고싶을만큼 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: It seems to be my favorite out of everything I've bought! I got it because I didn't have any latex toys, and it's already become her favorite toy. It's so cute that I want to collect other colors too

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
공을 워낙 좋아하긴 하지만
나름의 호불호 기준이 있는듯해요
3시간동안 물고 뜯고 삑삑거리고 엄청 좋아합니다
대만족이예요 ! :)
reviews.content_en: She loves balls, but she seems to have her own preferences. She's been biting, chewing, and squeaking it for 3 hours and loves it so much. I'm very happy with it! :)

reviews.name: M****
reviews.content: 리뉴얼 전에 컬리에서 구매했었는데 정말 집착수준으로 요것만 갖고놀아서 세번정도 더 사줬었어요. 너덜너덜해져서 새로 구입하려는데 판매종료였구 ㅠㅠ 딴 장난감은 쳐다도 안봐서 걱정했는데 다행히 리뉴얼버전으로 나와서 발견하구 바로 구매했어요. 역시나 요것만 갖고놀아요 ㅎㅎㅎ 신나게 노는거 볼때마다 기분이 너무 좋아용💕
reviews.content_en: I bought this from Curly before the renewal and my dog was so obsessed with it that I bought it three more times. It got all tattered so I was trying to buy a new one, but it was discontinued ㅠㅠ I was worried since she won't even look at other toys, but thankfully the renewed version came out and I found it and bought it right away. Sure enough, she only plays with this one ㅎㅎㅎ Every time I see her playing so happily, I feel so good 💕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 엄청 잘갖고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ 공이 튀겨서 호기심을 자극하는 듯 해요! 가볍게 튀기는건 아니고 묵직하게 튀겨요 그리고 물면 소리가 나니까 더 잘 갖고 노네요~ 하우스에도 들여놓고 자요! 넘나 귀엽…..
reviews.content_en: He plays with it so much lol 😂 The ball bounces and it really stimulates his curiosity! It's not a light bounce—it bounces with a nice solid weight. Plus it makes a sound when he bites it, so he loves playing with it even more~ He even takes it to his house and sleeps with it! So cute…..🥰

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무너무 좋아해요 제일 좋아하는 애착 장난감이 되었어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 실리콘이라 먼지가 묻고 하는데 그런건 하루에 한번 물에 씻어주면 먼지 걱정 없네요 그리고 실리콘이라 그런지 바닥에 통통 튕기는데 그것도 너무 좋아하고 지금 이갈이 중인데 실리콘 장난감 씹다 이빨이 붙어 나와 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 쌀알도 득템했네요
reviews.content_en: My puppy loves it so much! It's become his favorite attachment toy lol 😂 It's silicone so dust gets on it sometimes, but a quick rinse in water once a day keeps it clean. Since it's silicone, it bounces really nicely on the floor and he goes crazy for that too. He's teething right now and got a tooth stuck to the silicone toy when he was chewing lol 😂😂 Scored some rice grains too haha

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 내구성이 넘 좋고 아이가 파괴지왕이지만 잘 견뎠네요 아이 최애 입니다 쟁여 놓고 선물처럼 하나씩 줍니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The durability is amazing and even though my kid is a total destruction king, it held up really well. It's his absolute favorite! I hide them away and give them to him one at a time like presents 😄

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
친구네 강쥐 주려고 샀어요
라텍스 재질 장난감 좋아해서 닮는 디자인으로 구매했습니다
reviews.content_en: Bought it for my friend's puppy. She loves latex toys, so I got this because it has a similar design.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 워낙 삑삑이 매니아인 우리애는 최애 장남감이 되어 자나깨나 함께하네요
reviews.content_en: Since my pup is such a squeaky toy fanatic, this has become his favorite toy and he carries it around day and night 🐕

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 우연히 애견까페에서 삿는데 너무좋아해서 비싸도 대량구매합니다ㅜㅜ 안찢어지진않아요..  2개째 찢어서..^^ 또찢기고 찾을걸 대비하여 4개더삿습니당.
reviews.content_en: I randomly bought it at a dog cafe and he loved it so much that I do bulk orders even though it's pricey 😭 It doesn't tear easily.. well, the second one tore lol ^^ Just in case it tears again, I bought 4 more 😅

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽네요 ㅋㅋ 새 장난감 좋아하는데.. 정말 2분이네요 ㅋㅋㅋ아쉽아쉽;;
reviews.content_en: It's so cute lol 😂 He usually likes new toys but.. this one lasted literally 2 minutes 😂😂 Too bad;;

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
갈색푸들이라 초코브라운색으로 구매했어요
우리  강아지가 장난감 엄청 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: I have a brown poodle so I got it in chocolate brown color. My puppy really loves this toy! 🐩

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 우연한 기회에 오프라인 매장에서 구입한 장난감인데 반려견이 넘 좋아해서 꾸준히 구매하는 품목중 한가지입니다. 잘 가지고 놀아서 고장도 잘 나기는 하지만 소리가 안나도 던져달라고 자꾸 물고와서 가끔 숨겨버리고 싶기도 합니다...ㅎ 아이와 소통하기 좋은 장난감이에요~~
reviews.content_en: I bought this toy at a physical store by chance, and my pet loved it so much that it's become one of the items I consistently repurchase. He plays with it so much that it breaks pretty often, but even when it stops making sounds, he keeps bringing it back asking me to throw it—sometimes I hide it from him lol 😅 It's a great toy for bonding with your pup~~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 애기가 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎ 삑삑 소리도 잘 나요
reviews.content_en: My baby plays with it a lot 😄 The squeaky sound works great too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
최애장난감이에요~~
항상 옆에다가..^^
다른 장난감보다 견고합니다
reviews.content_en: It's my favorite toy~~ 🎾 Always by my side..^^ It's more durable than other toys

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 너무 잘가지고 놀고 제품이 정교하니 좋으네요
reviews.content_en: My pup plays with it so well and the product is so well-made, I love it!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 고장나거나 잃어버려서 계속 재구매중 너무 귀얍고 튼튼해여
reviews.content_en: I keep repurchasing because it keeps breaking or getting lost 😭 It's so cute and sturdy!

reviews.name: a****
reviews.content: 새로 사준 장난감이 너무 커서 물고 잘 못 놀길래 다시 장만해주었는데, 자기껀지 어떻게 알고 둘 다 안 놓치려고 턱에 넣어 놓거나 이불에 숨겨 놓고 주변에도 못 오게 해요ㅋㅋㅋ귀여워요 장난감도 강쥐도
reviews.content_en: The new toy I bought was too big so my pup couldn't really play with it, so I got him another one. Somehow he knows it's his and won't let go of either one—he tucks them in his jaw or hides them in blankets and won't let anyone near them ㅋㅋㅋ He's so cute, and so is the toy!

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 그것은 내 작은 종의 강아지에게 너무 귀엽고 적합해!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and perfect for my small breed dog!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
갈색이랑 크림라떼 두개 구매했어요 :) 
푸들이나 비숑키우시는 분들이라면 안살수 없을거 같아요 
ㅎㅎㅎ 갈색푸들 키우는 친구에게 하나 선물해줬다니 좋아하네요! 그리고 처음 받았을 때 본드냄새가 좀 나요 참고하세요
reviews.content_en: I bought two—brown and cream latte colored ones 😊 If you have a Poodle or Bichon, I don't think you can skip this! I gave one to a friend who has a brown Poodle and she loves it! Just a heads up—there's a slight glue smell when you first receive it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 최애삑삑이 너무 행복해해여ㅌㅋㅋ구멍나면 또 살거
reviews.content_en: My favorite squeaky toy makes him so happy!! 💕 When it gets a hole, I'll just buy it again

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
이게 제일 나중에 왔는데 라텍스를 이길수있는 솜인형은 없었나봐요...
동그란 라텍스는 주인이 질린다! 
하시는 주인들은 내동생얼굴울 구매하세요ㅋㅋ 예측할수없게 튕겨서 주인은 재밌지만 덩달아 내동생 슬개골도 걱정됩니다....? 
원반처럼 던지면 덜튕기고 예측이 나름대로 가능하게 떨어져서 강물에
돌맹이로 수제비뜨듯 던져주고있어요
이것을 이기는 라텍스는 아이스크림콘이란걸 아이스크림콘모양 라텍스가 도착하고 알았어요
네...사진은 아이스크림콘라텍스가 오고 난 뒤 정리당한 장난감무덤
reviews.content_en: This arrived last, but it seems there's no plush toy that beats latex... The round latex? Owners get bored of it! For owners who do, get my brother's face-shaped one ㅋㅋㅋ It bounces unpredictably so it's fun for me but I'm also worried about my brother's kneecap...? When I throw it like a frisbee it bounces less and lands more predictably, so I throw it in the river like tossing stones for making sujebi. I found out the latex that beats this is the ice cream cone shape—after the ice cream cone latex arrived. Yeah... the photo is the toy graveyard after the ice cream cone latex arrived.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
그냥 귀여워서 사준 장난감인데 이제 다른 장난감들은 쳐다도 안봅니다 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
진작 사줄걸 그랬나봐요 라텍스 장난감 강추에요!!
reviews.content_en: I just bought this toy because it's cute, and now my pup won't even look at the other toys ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I should've bought it sooner! Highly recommend latex toys!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 선물할려고 구매했는데 너무너무 귀여워요^^
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a gift and it's so so cute!! 😊😊
